text: - c. HUD review. The HUD Labor Relations field staff will review the requested classification and wage rate to determine whether the request meets the DOL rules outlined in paragraph 2-2(a), above.  If additional information or clarification is needed, the staff will contact the prime contractor (or contract administrator for local agency projects) for more information, etc.  If the Labor Relations review finds that the request meets the rules, the staff will give preliminary approval on the request and refer it to the DOL for final approval.  The staff will send to you a copy of the preliminary approval/referral letter to the DOL.
